title: inula divaricata
intro: Inula divaricata, also known as Chinese goldenseal or golden sealwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. Inula divaricata is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
